queue_item.action: Inventory additive queue-update history and emit a digest-bound canonical-change proposal without mutating shared state.

progress.finding: Canonical lag detection becomes reviewable only when the exact canonical bytes and every supplied additive update are individually hashed and the resulting proposal is itself digest-bound.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical candidate files before commit
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and synthetic fixtures only; private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded

queue_item.handoff: Run the adapter in a complete checkout, persist the resulting proposal, then bind an authorized reviewer identity and exact post-application verification before any manual ACTIVE_QUEUE.json update.

reason: Continuity Mining owns this additive record but does not overwrite shared canonical state or another team's records.
